description_long: This oyster object features a robust, oval-shaped shell with a slightly domed profile and a rough, textured exterior. The outer surface displays a complex pattern of dark brown, black, and cream striations, interspersed with irregular patches and bands that create a mottled appearance. The shell's ridges are prominent and irregularly spaced, running concentrically from the hinge area toward the outer edge, giving the surface a rugged, layered look. The natural opening is off-center, positioned toward one end of the shell, and reveals a pale, slightly glossy interior with subtle growth lines. The edge of the shell is uneven and somewhat jagged, with a mix of thin, sharp sections and thicker, rounded areas. The overall luster of the shell is mostly matte with occasional pearly highlights, especially near the opening.
description: A rugged, oval oyster shell with dark mottled striations, prominent ridges, and a matte to pearly finish. The shell features an off-center opening and an irregular, jagged edge.
description_view_0: The oyster is seen from the side, showing the off-center opening and the pale, slightly glossy interior, with the rough, striated exterior partially visible.
description_view_1: Viewed from the hinge end, the shell's domed profile and the dense, dark striations on the exterior are prominent, with the opening mostly hidden.
description_view_2: The back of the oyster displays the full extent of the dark, mottled striations and the concentric ridges, with no interior visible.
description_view_3: From the opposite end, the shell's irregular, jagged edge and the layered, rough texture of the exterior are highlighted.
attribute_shell_pattern: The shell exhibits a dense, irregular pattern of dark brown and black striations interspersed with lighter cream and white bands. These markings are arranged in concentric, somewhat chaotic bands radiating from the hinge area, with some areas showing mottled patches and others more linear streaks. The density of the pattern is highest near the hinge and outer edge, with the central area displaying a more blended gradient of colors.
attribute_shell_ridges: The shell has numerous, prominent ridges that are irregularly spaced and vary in height and thickness. These ridges run concentrically from the hinge toward the outer edge, with some sections appearing more pronounced and others more subdued. The texture is rough and layered, with no uniformity in the spacing or prominence of the ridges.
attribute_shell_opening_orientation: The natural opening is off-center, located toward one end of the shell, and is aligned laterally relative to the overall oval shape. The opening is visible from the side and reveals the pale interior, contrasting with the darker exterior.
attribute_shell_edge_contour: The outer edge of the shell is irregular and jagged, with a mix of thin, sharp sections and thicker, rounded areas. The contour is wavy and uneven, lacking smoothness, and features occasional notches and protrusions that add to its rugged appearance.
attribute_shell_luster: The shell's surface is predominantly matte with occasional pearly highlights, especially near the opening and along some of the ridges. The luster is low to moderate in intensity and is not uniformly distributed across the shell.
